home.subtitle: Data Engineer @ Decathlon Digital
home.description: Data Engineer with 8 years of experience, I build large-scale data pipelines that turn raw data into strategic decisions — Spark, AWS, Databricks.

about.title: About
about.who_text: Hi! I'm Hamdi Mechelloukh, Data Engineer at Decathlon Digital in Lille. I started my career in backend development before specializing in data engineering. I design and maintain large-scale data pipelines using Spark, AWS and Databricks.
about.journey_text: After retraining through AFPA, I moved from Node.js/Java development to data engineering, working at Boulanger and PROMOD as a contractor. Since 2022, I've been at Decathlon Digital where I ensured the stability of economic performance data before joining the pricing data team.
about.interest_karate_text: Practitioner since May 2013, 2nd Dan. Also teaching since 2025.
about.interest_gaming_text: Passionate about RPGs and geek culture in general.
about.interest_pop_text: Manga, comics, memes and everything geek.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.description: A selection of my recent work.
portfolio.project_1_description: End-to-end vendor-neutral data lakehouse: Kafka → Spark → Iceberg ingestion (bronze/silver/gold) with Airflow, Great Expectations, Terraform IaC (AWS) and a Streamlit dashboard.
portfolio.project_2_description: End-to-end real-time streaming pipeline: CSV simulation → Kafka → 3 Flink 2.0 jobs (revenue aggregation, CEP anomaly detection, global KPIs) → Apache Iceberg on MinIO, with Prometheus, Grafana and RocksDB checkpoints.
portfolio.project_3_description: End-to-end MLOps pipeline: feature engineering → XGBoost → FastAPI serving, with MLflow tracking, Evidently drift detection, Airflow orchestration, Prometheus metrics and multi-cloud deployment (Terraform AWS/GCP/Azure + Helm K8s).
portfolio.project_4_description: Multi-LLM agentic framework: a LangGraph pipeline orchestrates 4 specialized agents (Architect, Designer, Developer, Tester) to turn a free-text request into tested, documented code, with SVG asset generation and automatic fix loop.
portfolio.project_5_description: Real-time multiplayer Minesweeper: two players compete on identical grids via WebSocket, with a constraint-propagation solver ensuring always-solvable boards, a PostgreSQL leaderboard and an installable PWA.
portfolio.project_6_description: The site you are currently browsing, built with React and Vite.
portfolio.project_7_description: Family tool to preserve burial concessions: centralized tracking of renewal deadlines, automatic email alerts before expiry, and admin space. Public landing page with a contact form for inbound requests.
